topStories.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair nomination hearing reportedly delayed — When is next hearing, what's causing hold-up
topStories.description: Kevin Warsh's nomination hearing for Federal Reserve chair has been delayed, leaving the confirmation timeline unclear. Details here.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 42 of US-Israeli attacks?
topStories.description: A Pakistan-brokered US-Iran ceasefire has taken effect but disputes over its scope are fuelling regional tensions.

topStories.title: Congress demands PM Modi's apology over delay in women's reservation - Business Standard
topStories.description: Congress demands PM Modi's apology over delay in women's reservation  Business Standard

topStories.title: Doland Trump caught off guard as Melania shuts down Epstein link claims - what he said
topStories.description: Melania Trump denied any ties to Jeffrey Epstein, rejecting claims of victimization. In a White House statement, she emphasized her lack of relationship with Epstein, calling the accusations lies and urging Congress to hold hearings for victims.

topStories.title: Quote of the day: John F Kennedy's timeless words of wisdom — 'If free society cannot help poor, it cannot….'
topStories.description: Former US President John F Kennedy believed that a society's freedom is contingent on its support for the impoverished, linking the fates of the rich and poor.

topStories.title: Insider trading over US-Iran war? White House sends warning to staff, asks officials not to bet on prediction markets
topStories.description: The email issued on 24 March came a day after US President Donald Trump issued a brief pause on some Iran strikes. It advised employees against placing trades on financial markets and fast-growing event betting platforms.

topStories.title: UK PM Keir Starmer visits Gulf to shore up ‘fragile’ US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: As UK PM Keir Starmer arrived in Doha as part of a Gulf tour he discussed efforts to secure the US-Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Congress leader alleges abduction bid by police after being stopped for ‘traffic violation’ in Shimla
dailyNews.description: The incident took place near the Congress headquarters here, when the police personnel stopped the vehicle of Yudhveer Singh Bains for checking.

dailyNews.title: How Congress' Baramati Withdrawal Is A Well-Planned Political Strategy
dailyNews.description: By fielding a candidate in Baramati, the Congress had initially signalled clearly that it would not back down from its ideological stance against the BJP-led 'Mahayuti' alliance.

dailyNews.title: Japanese tankers head closer to Strait of Hormuz as more ships gather after US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: With hundreds of vessels stuck since US and Israeli strikes began at the end of February, some are now beginning to shift positions to be nearer to Hormuz. A ceasefire has pushed shipowners to begin considering options, though most say conditions are still too unclear to attempt an exit.

dailyNews.title: Opinion: Skill Issues? Why The World's Strongest Military Keeps Messing Up Its Wars
dailyNews.description: This has been primarily an outcome of Washington's inability to effectively combine military capacity with political acumen.

dailyNews.title: Iran-US war: Tehran denies reports of negotiators travelling to Pakistan for talks
dailyNews.description: Pakistan's capital is on high alert with 10,000 security personnel deployed. JD Vance is set to lead talks in Islamabad amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the US.

dailyNews.description: Kevin Warsh's nomination hearing for Federal Reserve chair has been delayed, leaving the confirmation timeline unclear. Details here.

dailyNews.description: The email issued on 24 March came a day after US President Donald Trump issued a brief pause on some Iran strikes. It advised employees against placing trades on financial markets and fast-growing event betting platforms.

dailyNews.title: UK PM Keir Starmer visits Gulf to shore up ‘fragile’ US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: As UK PM Keir Starmer arrived in Doha as part of a Gulf tour he discussed efforts to secure the US-Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Iran's IRGC denies attacking Gulf States as Kuwait condemns aggression, Saudi Arabia reports damage to oil facilities
dailyNews.description: The developments come amid a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, after negotiators clinched a temporary two-week truce just 90 minutes before Trump's Tuesday deadline to Tehran over the Strait of Hormuz was to expire. US and Iranian negotiators are set to meet on Saturday for talks.

dailyNews.title: Shipping in Strait of Hormuz still at a trickle despite US-Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Washington and Tehran accuse each other of not honouring truce agreement.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court flags risk of ‘dividing society’ if temple access restricted by caste or sect
dailyNews.description: "If you say it is a practice…that only my section must attend my temple and no one else, that is not good for Hinduism,” the nine-judge bench remarked.

dailyNews.title: Why Melania Trump is denying alleged smears related to Jeffrey Epstein–and wants victims to testify
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump shocked reporters with a live White House speech denying ties to Jeffrey Epstein, calling fake images and smears politically motivated.

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Biden admin for releasing illegal immigrant now charged in fatal hammer attack on Florida mother
dailyNews.description: President blasts Biden for releasing a Haitian immigrant now accused of fatally bludgeoning a woman with a hammer at a Florida gas station last week.

dailyNews.title: Coast Guard seizes over 4,500 pounds of cocaine worth $34M from suspected narco-terrorist vessel on Easter
dailyNews.description: DHS says the Coast Guard recovered more than 4,500 pounds of cocaine off the coast of Ecuador as part of Operation Pacific Viper counter-drug efforts.

dailyNews.title: ICE says more criminal migrants arrested on 1-year anniversary of program to support victims of migrant crime
dailyNews.description: ICE said it had arrested more illegal migrants with criminal convictions, coinciding with the one-year anniversary of the agency’s program supporting victims of migrant crime.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court blocks candidate after alleged GOP infiltration scheme exposed
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rejected a progressive candidate's bid to enter Ohio's Republican primary after he allegedly misrepresented his party affiliation.

dailyNews.title: MAN VS MACHINE: Philadelphians aren't taking kindly to sharing sidewalks with delivery robots
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia residents are clashing with Uber Eats delivery robots, with incidents of kicking and sitting on the autonomous sidewalk couriers reported.

dailyNews.title: Child among 4 dead as accused arsonist allegedly drank beer during chaos
dailyNews.description: Roman Amatitla was charged with murder and arson after allegedly setting a random Queens building fire that killed four, including a 3-year-old girl.

dailyNews.title: Neighbor fatally shoots alleged gunman after 2 women shot in domestic dispute
dailyNews.description: A Washington state man allegedly shot two female relatives in a domestic dispute before a neighbor intervened and fatally shot him, police said.

dailyNews.title: California school board member refuses to follow state’s sanctuary policies, citing 'rule of law'
dailyNews.description: A California school district is defying the state's guidance on immigration enforcement. Trustee Andrew Hayes says the policy is fearmongering to advance Gavin Newsom's agenda.

topStories.description: Melania Trump shocked reporters with a live White House speech denying ties to Jeffrey Epstein, calling fake images and smears politically motivated.

topStories.title: Trump blasts Biden admin for releasing illegal immigrant now charged in fatal hammer attack on Florida mother
topStories.description: President blasts Biden for releasing a Haitian immigrant now accused of fatally bludgeoning a woman with a hammer at a Florida gas station last week.

topStories.title: Melania Trump's forceful Epstein denial draws bipartisan support from lawmakers
topStories.description: First lady Melania Trump denounced allegations tying her to Jeffrey Epstein, prompting bipartisan calls for congressional hearings and accountability.

topStories.title: Inside Tehran after strikes: Iranian woman describes fear, checkpoints and people used as ‘human shields’
topStories.description: An anonymous Iranian woman detailed to The Australian the nightly explosions, celebrations and fear in Tehran as Trump's two-week ceasefire with Iran tentatively took hold.

topStories.title: Bruce Springsteen blasts rich men in America as critics call out his billions
topStories.description: Bruce Springsteen sparked controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.

topStories.title: Ivanka Trump breaks down in emotional interview talking about her mother Ivana’s death, other challenges
topStories.description: Ivanka Trump became emotional discussing her late mother Ivana Trump's sudden death and other personal challenges during a rare podcast interview.

topStories.title: Senate Dem accuses Trump of being 'unfit for office,' joins growing call to impeach, oust president
topStories.description: Sen. Andy Kim, D-N.J., said President Donald Trump should be removed over the Iran war, citing the 25th Amendment and impeachment as Democrats escalate calls to oust the president.

topStories.title: Amid Trump’s Threats, NATO Labors to Survive the Iran War
topStories.description: President Trump is citing the unwillingness of European nations to back the United States in the conflict as another reason to scale back or abandon the alliance. And he still wants Greenland.

dailyNews.title: Amid Trump’s Threats, NATO Labors to Survive the Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump is citing the unwillingness of European nations to back the United States in the conflict as another reason to scale back or abandon the alliance. And he still wants Greenland.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel Salutes Melania’s White House Surprise
dailyNews.description: The first lady addressed her relationship with Jeffrey Epstein in a prepared statement that the talk show host called “better than her movie.”

dailyNews.title: Xi Seeks to Sway Taiwan, and Trump, With Message of Stability
dailyNews.description: Ahead of a summit with Donald Trump, the Chinese leader is using a rare meeting with a Taiwanese politician to cast Beijing as a peacemaker and squeeze the island’s president.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela Approves New Law to Open Mining to Foreign Investors
dailyNews.description: The move opens the country’s coveted mineral fortune up to foreign investors, the latest move that Venezuela’s leadership has taken to satisfy the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran against charging tolls to go through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Only about a dozen ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the first two days of the ceasefire, far below normal traffic levels before the war, data shows.

dailyNews.title: 4/9: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he asked Netanyahu to scale back Lebanon strikes; Melania Trump makes a rare statement denying relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump criticizes NATO after talks with Rutte
dailyNews.description: President Trump bashed NATO after meeting with Secretary General Mark Rutte on Wednesday. Ken Thomas, national politics reporter for the Wall Street Journal and Dave Levinthal, senior editor for NOTUS, joined "The Takeout" to discuss that and some of the day's other top political headlines.

dailyNews.title: White House staff received email warning not to place bets on prediction markets
dailyNews.description: White House aides got an email last month telling them not to place bets on prediction markets with nonpublic information, multiple administration officials told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
dailyNews.description: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current chair Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: The Trump administration is getting angry as EU Big Tech fines top $7 billion in 2 years
dailyNews.description: The European Commission and Trump administration are increasingly clashing over the bloc's actions against U.S. tech companies.

dailyNews.title: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
dailyNews.description: Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz in the war with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.
